result.summary: Replicate exposes a token-authenticated HTTP API and an official hosted MCP server over SSE; no separate GraphQL API or first-party CLI surface was confirmed.
result.description: Replicate is a platform for running, publishing, and deploying machine learning models, including image, video, audio, and language models. It provides hosted infrastructure and APIs for developers to invoke models and manage related resources.

replicate_api_token.label: Replicate API token
replicate_api_token.setup: Sign in to your Replicate account, then open [API tokens](https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens) and create a token. Replicate's hosted MCP page links directly to [create a Replicate API token](https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens?new-token-name=replicate-mcp). You may need to sign in first via [GitHub sign-in](https://replicate.com/login/github/?next=/account/api-tokens?new-token-name=replicate-mcp). Use the token as a bearer token for the HTTP API, or provide it to MCP clients where they ask for a Replicate token or `REPLICATE_API_TOKEN`.
